svg.text: MiniMax M3 Lightning Indexer mask (sparse layer)
block=4 · top-k=2 blocks · local=1 block · selection is per block of keys
indexer-masked — block not in top-k ∪ local
1. score every key per (head, query), max-pool over the keys in each block → one score per KEY BLOCK
2. per query keep top-k key blocks ∪ the always-on local window block, under block-level causality
3. broadcast the per-block 0/-inf verdict back onto every key in the block (block granularity)
4. re-apply token-level causality inside the diagonal block (green/yellow stops at the query, k≤q)
